channel.title: 数据库 on Akynazh
channel.description: Recent content in 数据库 on Akynazh

item.title: Redis学习记录（二）
item.description: Author: akynazh 个人网站: akynazh 事务 127.0.0.1:6379> multi # 开启事务 OK 127.0.0.1:6379> set book java QUEUED 127.0.0.1:6379> get book QUEUED 127.0.0.1:6379> exec # 执行事务 1) OK 2) "java" 127.0.0.1:6379> get book "java" 127.0.0.1:6379> multi OK 127.0.0.1:6379> set name peter QUEUED 127.0.0.1:6379> discard # 取消事务 OK 127.0.0.1:6379> exec (error) ERR EXEC without MULTI 127.0.0.1:6379> get name (nil) 获

item.title: Redis学习记录（一）
item.description: Author: akynazh 个人网站: akynazh Open, Connect And Config open redis: redis-server connect to redis: redis-cli disconnect: redis-cli shutdown show chinese: redis-cli --raw connect to remote redis: redis-cli -h host -p port -a password get redis config: config get {config_name} Data Type list: lpush clist redis lpush clist mysql lrange clist 0 100 key: 127.0.0.1:6379> set mkey sos OK 127.0.0.1:6379> get mkey "sos" 127.0.0.1:6379> del mkey (integer)
